_comment: Phase 25.6 Task 2 (D15) — per-model post-simplify triangle caps. Read by scripts/city-pack.mjs (enforces during `pnpm assets:pack`) AND src/game/assets/cityPackBudgets.test.ts (asserts the shipped manifest never drifts back over cap) — ONE json, no drift between the two consumers. Ids not listed here are already <=600 tris and pass through the pipeline untouched (no simplify stage applied). `optOut` lists ids that skip simplify entirely even though they have a cap below, for a documented silhouette-break reason (empty for now — see the id's own comment if one is ever added).
